title: Vibe Coding
content:
# Vibe Coding
QUICK FACTS: 37 sessions (2× per week, 2×45 min, evening format) | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price Rp 13.000.000 (instalments 4×3.250.000/mo interest-free, same total) | DP Rp 500.000 (book within 24 hours → minus 1.000.000 → 12.000.000; the value of starting now at a discount) | outcome: a full-stack app in production + IT STEP certificate
## Essence
You build a real application with AI, offline on campus or online. Selling hooks (all true, use where they fit): the student assembles a working mini-service (landing page / ToDo) ALREADY IN THE FIRST session via prompts; across the course — a ladder of several projects of growing complexity + a final full-stack project deployed to a real URL, with a README and a video demo for the portfolio; the program covers the agentic AI tools the industry actually works with (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot); there is a product block (problem, audience, MVP, feature plan) — for those coming with THEIR OWN app/business idea; Git from the very first project as a safety net: you can't break anything, you can always roll back. Indonesian language (technical terms in English). Group ≤14 people, instructor is a practicing developer. All tool subscriptions are provided (Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot); access to a computer and a workstation. For those who want to ship a product without classical programming, career changers, junior developers, owners of app ideas. NOT for those chasing quick money, expecting AI to do everything by itself, senior developers, or those who cannot attend regularly. Requirements: basic computer literacy, no programming experience needed.
## Program
26 modules, 6 tracks: (1) Foundations — what AI is, prompt engineering; (2) Toolkit — Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code; (3) Code Literacy — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, DOM; (4) Control — Git, GitHub, version control; (5) Architecture — full-stack, MVC, MVP planning; (6) Ship — deployment, testing, publishing to production. No game-dev track, but a browser game is acceptable as the final project.
## Price and payment
13.000.000 (Early Bird has ended — never quote 11.000.000). The price already includes subscriptions to ALL the course's AI tools (Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot) for the duration of study — nothing needs to be bought separately; this is the key value argument for the "why so expensive" question: on their own these subscriptions cost real money every month. Instalments 4×3.250.000/mo interest-free (same total, not more expensive). Book-now discount: DP 500.000 within 24 hours → minus 1.000.000 → 12.000.000 (or 4×3.000.000/mo); the DP 500K counts toward the total. Vibe Coding only, NOT for Python Back-End.
## Schedule and format
37 sessions, 2× per week, 2 academic hours (2×45 min) + a break, evenings. Enrollment open until the group fills (≤14). Group start end of July 2026 (exact date confirmed closer to the time). Group A Mon&Wed, B Tue&Thu, C Wed&Fri. Offline campus Menara Sudirman / online.
## Outcome and certificate
The final project is a complete full-stack application (front + back + database) deployed to a URL, GitHub repository + README, in the portfolio. Examples: booking system, dashboard, CRM, task manager, form with a database. IT STEP certificate after passing the final exam and defending the project. Landing: https://itstep.id/id/vibe-coding · Brochure PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QTrbfI1eKuo8AjLKas0iZlijucAbhHZk/view

title: Python Back-End Development + AI
content:
# Python Back-End Developer + AI
QUICK FACTS: 8 months (2× per week, 16 h/mo) | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price Rp 13.360.000 (monthly 1.670.000×8; per semester 2×6.480.000; full upfront 12.570.000) | DP Rp 500.000 | instalments 1.670.000/mo | outcome: back-end skills, job-ready + IT STEP certificate (with BNSP eligibility)
## Essence
Become a Python back-end developer with modern AI skills. Classical foundation (Python, OOP, SOLID) + web basics + Django/REST + OpenAI API and LangChain; practical tasks and real cases, live classes. For adults 18-55 who want to become back-end developers (work in IT), deep career changers, students, non-IT professionals, IT specialists upskilling. No IT experience required. NOT for those who want to ship products quickly with AI without becoming a programmer → Vibe Coding; for children → to a manager.
## Program
46 modules, 4 blocks: (1) Python L1 (17) syntax, data types, loops, strings, lists, functions, OOP, design patterns, SOLID, AI/LLM tools, project management; (2) Intro to Web (6) HTML, CSS, graphics, tables, layout, forms; (3) JavaScript (8) basics, objects, arrays, DOM, forms, JSON, async/await, talking to a server; (4) Python Advanced (15) databases, REST API, Django + Django REST Framework, chatbot, OpenAI API, LangChain. Django (Python) is taught, NOT Laravel/PHP.
## Price and payment
Monthly 1.670.000/mo ×8 = 13.360.000. Per semester 2×6.480.000 = 12.960.000 (≈1.620.000/mo). Full upfront 12.570.000 (≈1.571.250/mo, saves ~790K — best price). NO book-now/early-bird discounts.
## Schedule and format
2 sessions/week → 8 sessions/mo; 4 h/week → 16 h/mo. Tracks: Beginner 3 mo * Intermediate 6 mo (BNSP-eligible) * Professional 8 mo (BNSP-eligible, the default; price above is for this track). Offline campus Menara Sudirman / online. Group start: end of July — Mon&Wed, Tue&Thu or Wed&Fri.
## Outcome and certificate
Back-end skills: web application, chatbot, database, REST API, asynchronous programming; project portfolio. IT STEP certificate (English); the Intermediate and Professional tracks grant BNSP eligibility (national competency standard). Landing: https://itstep.id/python · Brochure PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jcb9BZE8vbheoJsV953eRci4iKW229G1/view

title: Data Analyst
content:
# Data Analyst
QUICK FACTS: 9 months | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price Rp 15.030.000 (monthly 1.670.000×9 or full upfront) | DP Rp 500.000 | instalments 1.670.000/mo | outcome: international diploma + portfolio, job-ready as a data analyst
## Essence
Hands-on data analytics: SQL/MS SQL Server, Python (Pandas/NumPy/Matplotlib/Seaborn), Power BI and Generative AI (ChatGPT/Copilot/OpenAI API). Live classes with an instructor (not self-study), level-based progression available, offline or online. For beginners (no IT background, 18-55, no entrance test), non-IT professionals, analysts growing further, business owners/managers. NOT for under-18s / those who need a university degree.
## Program
SQL and MS SQL Server: relational model, SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, JOIN, normalization, aggregates, subqueries, stored procedures, triggers, functions, CTE. Python: variables, strings, lists, dictionaries, OOP, exceptions, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn. Power BI (NOT Tableau): import/transform/filters, reports, DAX, dashboard. Generative AI: LLMs, GitHub Copilot, prompts for ChatGPT, OpenAI API integration.
## Price and payment
Monthly 1.670.000/mo ×9 = 15.030.000. Full upfront 15.030.000. One-day mini-course: offline 600.000 / online 500.000 (paid in full upfront).
## Schedule and format
9 months; by levels L1 3 mo, L2 6 mo total, L3 9 mo total. Exact class days (Mon/Wed vs Tue/Thu) and start date → needs_manager. Offline campus Menara Sudirman / online. Mini-course: 1 day, 5 hours (09:00-14:00), online/offline, starts July 26, 09:00-14:00.
## Outcome and certificate
International IT STEP Academy diploma (Indonesian+English, recognized in 24 countries; mini-course = international IT STEP certificate); project portfolio; Data Analyst roles in finance/marketing/healthcare/tech. Global salary (Indonesian market varies): entry $500-970/mo → mid $800-2.188 → senior $2.000-5.000. Landing: https://itstep.id/data-analyst · Brochure: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

title: Cybersecurity Engineer + AI
content:
# Cybersecurity Engineer + AI
QUICK FACTS: 8 months/120 hours (2× per week, 2 hours) | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price from Rp 13.360.000 | DP Rp 500.000 | instalments 1.670.000/mo ×8 | outcome: SOC skills, job-ready + IT STEP certificate (path to Cisco CyberOps Associate)
## Essence
Official Cisco Networking Academy program — from cybersecurity fundamentals to Cisco CyberOps Associate certification prep; hands-on labs + real SOC cases. For beginners/career changers moving into security, students/graduates and IT practitioners (ages 18-55). NOT for under-18s or those wanting a purely theoretical program.
## Program
Introduction to cybersecurity; Cybercrime Fighters; Windows OS; Linux OS; network protocols; Ethernet and IP; connectivity testing; ARP; transport layer; network services; network mapping; network security infrastructure; Threat Actors and Tools; common threats and attacks; network monitoring tools; attack defense principles; access control; threat intelligence services; cryptography; workstation and server hardening; vulnerability assessment; data protection technologies and protocols; alert sources; digital forensics, incident analysis and response; Cisco CyberOps Associate certification path.
## Price and payment
Monthly 1.670.000/mo ×8 = 13.360.000. Per semester 2×6.480.000 = 12.960.000 (≈1.620.000/mo). Full upfront 12.570.000 (≈1.571.250/mo, saves ~790K — best price). NO book-now/early-bird discounts.
## Schedule and format
8 months (120 hours), 2 sessions/week, 2 hours each. Level-based option: L1 3 mo, L2 6 mo total, L3 8 mo total. Starts in August. Offline campus Menara Sudirman OR online (remote).
## Outcome and certificate
IT STEP Academy certificate; BNSP on request + extra fee (full program only). Skills: network anomaly detection, incident investigation and containment, threat intelligence, SIEM monitoring; SOC lab portfolio. Demand evidence (not a salary promise): ISC2 2025 shortage ~4.8M openings; Cybersecurity Ventures ~3.5M (https://cybersecurityventures.com/jobs/); security hiring ~113% of pre-pandemic level. Landing: https://itstep.id/cybersecurity · Program PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AiuvU-6EBDI39-cZtDNqjecKSv7XNNQh/view

title: UI/UX Design
content:
# UI/UX Design
QUICK FACTS: 5 months (2× per week) | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price monthly 1.710.000/mo ×5 = Rp 8.550.000 (full upfront Rp 8.350.000) | DP Rp 500.000 | outcome: international diploma + portfolio with real client projects
## Essence
Comprehensive UI/UX program — 5 months, 12 thematic blocks — the full design cycle from UX research and strategy to UI, mobile, web, AR/VR and soft skills. Core tools: Figma + After Effects. Offline or online. For students, career changers from any field, designers moving into IT product design, creative professionals who want to design digital interfaces (web/mobile/AR/VR). Ages 16-55. NOT for those who want only print/brand graphic design → Graphic Design.
## Program
12 modules: (1) UX/UI fundamentals; (2) Preparing a web product for development; (3) Information architecture and content; (4) Working in Figma (core tool); (5) Responsive and mobile design; (6) UI systems and design; (7) Mobile interfaces; (8) Usability testing; (9) Recreating and hypotheses (redesign); (10) Graphic and symbolic elements; (11) Soft skills for designers; (12) Final course project.
## Price and payment
Monthly 1.710.000/mo ×5 = 8.550.000. Full upfront (discounted) 8.350.000. DP 500.000 books the seat, the rest before classes start (the book-now discount does NOT apply — Vibe Coding only).
## Schedule and format
5 months; 2× per week. By levels: L1 2 mo, L2 4 mo total, L3 5 mo total. Starts in August. Offline campus Menara Sudirman / online.
## Outcome and certificate
International IT STEP Academy diploma (recognized in 24 countries); portfolio built on real client briefs; career guidance; alumni in 1,500+ companies worldwide. Landing: https://itstep.id/uiux-design · Brochure: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

title: Vibe Coding Demo Event
content:
# VIBE CODING DEMO EVENT

## QUICK FACTS
- **Duration:** 3 hours (09:00–12:00 WIB)
- **Next Event:** Saturday, August 8, 2026
- **Format:** Offline
- **Location:** IT STEP Academy Jakarta, Menara Sudirman, 8th Floor, South Jakarta
- **Price:** Rp100,000 per person
- **Result:** Experience Vibe Coding live and ask the instructor questions directly.

## OVERVIEW
A paid hands-on demo event where participants experience Vibe Coding in action, join the creation of a live mini project, and ask any questions about the course.

This is the official **"try before you enroll"** experience for the Vibe Coding program. There is no Vibe Coding bootcamp—this Demo Event replaces it.

The event is intended for people who are seriously considering joining Vibe Coding, including:
- Leads from Vibe Coding ads or social media posts.
- People who want to see how Vibe Coding works before enrolling.
- Prospective students who hesitate because of the full course price (Rp100,000 is a much smaller commitment).

## EVENT AGENDA
1. **Presentation**
   - What Vibe Coding is.
   - How AI-assisted development works.
   - The Vibe Coding approach.

2. **Live Demo**
   - The instructor builds a real mini project live.
   - Participants can observe and follow the development process.

3. **Live Q&A During the Demo**
   Participants can ask questions in real time, including:
   - What is the AI doing?
   - What is the developer doing?
   - Why did this error happen?
   - How is it fixed?

4. **Course Q&A**
   Open discussion about the full Vibe Coding program:
   - Curriculum
   - Schedule
   - Tuition
   - Learning outcomes
   - Enrollment process

## PRICING & PAYMENT
- **Admission fee: Rp100,000 per person.**
- **Participants under 18 years old may attend free only when accompanied by a paying adult.**
- **If a participant under 18 attends without a paying adult, the standard Rp100,000 admission fee applies.**
- Do **not** mention the full course price unless specifically asked.
- Do **not** offer free admission to adults.
- Only mention the under-18 free policy if the participant is actually under 18 and will attend with a paying adult.

## SCHEDULE & LOCATION
- **Time:** 09:00–12:00 WIB (3 hours)
- **Next Demo Event:** Saturday, August 8, 2026
- **Venue:** IT STEP Academy Jakarta, Menara Sudirman, 8th Floor, South Jakarta

Always provide this event date directly to the lead. No manager approval is required to confirm the date.

## OUTCOME
Participants will:
- Experience the Vibe Coding approach firsthand.
- Watch a live AI-assisted software development workflow.
- Ask the instructor questions directly about both the demo and the full program.

## REGISTRATION
Registration is handled via DM or WhatsApp.

Collect:
- Full name
- WhatsApp number

Then set **needs_manager = true** so the admissions team can confirm the registration and send the payment instructions (Rp100,000 per paying participant).

### Example Invitation
> "Hi Kak! We have a Vibe Coding Demo Event at our campus from 09:00–12:00 WIB. You'll see a live mini-project being built, experience how Vibe Coding works, and ask the instructor anything directly. The ticket is only Rp100,000. If you're under 18 and coming with a paying adult, you can join for free. May I register your name?"

title: SMM Intensive Course
content:
# SMM Intensive Course
QUICK FACTS: 2 weeks (3× per week, ~6 h/week) | offline Jakarta + available online | price Rp 1.882.955 (a PAID course, not a free trial) | DP Rp 500.000 books the seat, the rest before classes start | outcome: run social media and Meta Ads campaigns + IT STEP diploma
## Essence
A 2-week intensive — the full SMM cycle: goal setting and audience analysis → content production → a Meta advertising campaign. 3 sessions per week. After the course you can independently run a brand's social media and paid campaigns. For school students, non-IT people, IT specialists without experience (18-55). NOT for those looking for a long diploma program / who cannot commit ~6 h/week for 2 weeks. (Focused on paid campaigns, not AI content → see Social Media Content Bootcamp.)
## Program
6 modules: (1) SMM fundamentals — goals and objectives, competitor analysis, types of social promotion; (2) Content Strategy — content plan, content formats, KPIs, engagement; (3) Meta Business Tools — Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, product catalog; (4) Targeting & Tracking — audience parsing, pixel and retargeting, lookalike, optimization; (5) Advertising Strategy — campaign creation and optimization, analysis and reporting, promotion language; (6) Lead Generation & Optimization — lead generation, planning and remarketing, data analysis and reporting.
## Price and payment
1.882.955 (confirmed by the brochure). Payment: transfer, QR, paylater, credit card. DP 500.000 books the seat, the rest before classes start.
## Schedule and format
2 weeks; 3 sessions/week; ~6 h/week. End of July — Mon/Wed/Fri, or Saturday and Sunday. Offline Menara Sudirman, 8th floor, Jakarta + available online.
## Outcome and certificate
Ability to write a content plan and selling copy, design visuals, work in Meta Business Suite, launch and analyze campaigns, build a sales funnel; skills in content strategy, Meta Ads, landing pages and remarketing, conversion and optimization. IT STEP Academy diploma upon completion. Landing: https://itstep.id/smm-intensive-course · Brochure PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FhhLFo-jx_EYNGG1HIzfO3ugiXYZuMbX/view

title: Graphic Design with AI
content:
# Graphic Design with AI
QUICK FACTS: 6 months (2× per week, 2 hours) | hybrid format (offline Jakarta / online remote) | price full upfront Rp 9.519.000 (per semester 2×4.522.000; monthly 1.670.000/mo) | DP Rp 500.000 | outcome: professional portfolio + IT STEP certificate
## Essence
A 6-month program: Photoshop retouching, Illustrator vector work, branding and advertising with AI tools throughout the course. 2× per week on campus or online. For ages 18-55 with no design experience, career changers moving into a creative profession (advertising, branding, digital design). NOT for professional designers seeking a narrow specialization / under-18s. (For digital product interfaces → see UI/UX.) IT STEP global network: 24 countries, 267K alumni.
## Program
Adobe Photoshop + AI (editing, retouching, collage, image work); Adobe Illustrator (vector, Bézier curves, composition); design theory (composition, color theory, perception psychology, AI integration); Corporate Identity & Branding with AI (logo, brand book, digital communications); Advertising Design (packaging, print, outdoor, digital). Professional equipment provided on campus.
## Price and payment
Full upfront 9.519.000. Per semester 4.522.000×2 (≈1.507.333/mo). Monthly instalments 1.670.000/mo. Discount/promo/corporate rate → needs_manager.
## Schedule and format
6 months; 2× per week, 2 hours (~4 h/week). By levels: L1 2 mo, L2 4 mo total, L3 6 mo total. Exact start date and schedule → needs_manager. Offline campus Menara Sudirman / online.
## Outcome and certificate
Professional portfolio; skills in composition, color theory, AI workflows, branding, ad production. IT STEP certificate; certificate issuance details → needs_manager. Graphic designer salary in Indonesia (per the 2026 brochure): junior 5-7M/mo, senior 8-10M, expert 11-20M. Landing: https://itstep.id/computer-graphics-and-design · Brochure PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1TWtN6ecPLXqFAiU-FgbVittEc0ncoDn1/view

title: Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI
content:
# Social Media Content Bootcamp with AI
QUICK FACTS: 1 day/9 hours, cohort August 23, 2026 (the only one) | format OFFLINE ONLY, Jakarta (no online option) | price Rp 750.000 paid in full, lunch included (no DP) | outcome: AI content portfolio + international IT STEP certificate
## Essence
A 1-day mini-bootcamp using AI to create social media content from idea to a finished carousel and promo materials. Focused on content creation with AI (not on ad strategy). For beginners and experienced users who want to produce content faster with AI, marketers, small business owners, content creators. NOT for those who need deep paid-ads/Meta Ads Manager training or a full SMM strategy course → SMM Intensive. Difference from SMM Intensive (2 weeks, 3× per week, 1.882.955, focused on Meta Ads/KPIs/analytics).
## Program
AI-assisted content ideation; creating effective posts with AI; carousel design; ready-to-use promo materials. The full module list is not yet published → needs_manager.
## Price and payment
750.000 including lunch. No DP, full payment only.
## Schedule and format
1 day, mini-course (9 hours). Next cohort August 23, 2026 (the only one scheduled). OFFLINE ONLY at the Menara Sudirman campus.
## Outcome and certificate
International IT STEP Academy certificate (ready for CV and LinkedIn); a portfolio of your own work (carousel and promo materials); a practical AI content-creation workflow. Landing: https://itstep.id/social-media-content-bootcamp-with-ai · Brochure: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12_B36sJqiVJcorx48khug5hDkJ-PgyaK

title: Data Analyst Skill Booster
content:
# Data Analyst Skill Booster
QUICK FACTS: 1 day/5 hours | format offline Jakarta / online (Teams) | price Rp 600.000 offline / Rp 500.000 online | DP — (no instalments) | outcome: a data mini-project + E-certificate
## Essence
Data Analytics fundamentals, working with real data, your first mini-project. For those who want to try Data Analytics before the full program; beginners with no IT/programming experience. NOT for those who want to become a professional Data Analyst in 1 day → route to the full program.
## Program
Excel for Data Analysis (tables and datasets, sorting and filters, basic formulas, Pivot Table, charts). SQL Fundamentals (what SQL is and why, SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, JOIN basics). Python for Data Analytics (intro to Python, variables and data types, reading a dataset, basic analysis, simple visualization). Mini Project (analyzing a sample dataset, combining Excel+SQL+Python, presenting conclusions).
## Price and payment
Offline 600.000; online 500.000. No instalments.
## Schedule and format
1 day, 5 hours. Offline at the Menara Sudirman campus; or online via Teams. Next group: August 9, 2026 (09:00-14:00).
## Outcome and certificate
A data-analysis mini-project; hands-on experience with Excel, SQL, Python; IT STEP E-certificate. Landing: https://itstep.id/id/data-analyst-mini-course

title: Python Development Skill Booster

title: Graphic Design Skill Booster
content:
# Graphic Design Skill Booster
QUICK FACTS: 1 day/5 hours (15:00-20:00) | format offline Jakarta / online (Teams) | price Rp 600.000 offline / Rp 500.000 online | DP — (no instalments) | outcome: portfolio-grade social media design + E-certificate

Graphic Design fundamentals using Adobe Photoshop + AI, creating your first portfolio-grade design. For those who want to try Graphic Design before the full program; beginners with no experience; content creators, business owners, anyone who wants to make professional visuals. NOT for those who want to become a professional Graphic Designer in 1 day → route to the full program.

Design Fundamentals (what Graphic Design is, core principles, hierarchy, alignment, contrast and white space, color palette); Adobe Photoshop Basics (workspace, Move/Text/Rectangle Tool, layers and groups, toolbar/canvas/ruler/artboards, cropping and masks, background removal); AI & Design Workflow (prompts for ChatGPT/Gemini, finding free assets, building a complete workflow); Final Project (a social media design, color correction, object and text placement, shadow/light/transparency, adjustment layers and blending modes, texture and finishing, export).
## Price and payment
Offline 600.000 (materials and coffee break included); online 500.000. No instalments.

1 day, 5 hours (15:00-20:00). Offline at the Menara Sudirman campus; or online via Teams. Next group: August 2, 2026.
## Outcome and certificate
A portfolio-grade social media design; hands-on experience with Photoshop and AI tools; IT STEP E-certificate.

title: UI/UX Design Skill Booster
content:
# UI/UX Design Skill Booster
QUICK FACTS: 1 day/5 hours (15:00-20:00) | format offline Jakarta / online (Teams) | price Rp 600.000 offline / Rp 500.000 online | DP — (no instalments) | outcome: your first interface design in Figma + E-certificate

UI/UX Design fundamentals, understanding user-experience principles, your first interface design in Figma + AI. For those who want to try UI/UX before the full program; beginners with no design experience; future UI/UX designers, product designers, anyone interested in digital product design. NOT for those who want to become a professional UI/UX Designer in 1 day → route to the full program.

Introduction to UI/UX (what UI/UX is, the difference between UI and UX, UX thinking and design thinking); Basic UI Design (layout, color choice, typography, visual hierarchy, components and consistency); Figma Basics (intro to Figma, creating frames, shapes and text, Auto Layout, a simple interface); AI for UI/UX (generating a simple wireframe, improving design ideas, speeding up the workflow); Final Project (designing one mobile app screen, applying UI principles, a basic wireframe in Figma, presentation).
## Price and payment
Offline 600.000; online 500.000. No instalments.
## Schedule and format
1 day, 5 hours (15:00-20:00). Offline at the Menara Sudirman campus; or online via Teams. Next group: July 19, 2026.
## Outcome and certificate
A simple UI design in Figma; understanding of core UI/UX principles; experience using AI for wireframing; IT STEP E-certificate.

title: Cybersecurity Skill Booster
content:
# Cybersecurity Skill Booster
QUICK FACTS: 1 day/5 hours (15:00-20:00) | format offline Jakarta / online (Teams) | price Rp 700.000 offline / Rp 600.000 online | DP — (no instalments) | outcome: first hands-on exposure to cybersecurity + E-certificate
## Essence
Cybersecurity fundamentals, recognizing common cyber threats, hands-on practice protecting digital systems. For those who want to try the cybersecurity track before the full program; beginners with no experience; school students/professionals/business owners who want to protect their data. NOT for those who want to become a professional Cybersecurity Engineer in 1 day → route to the full program.
## Program
Introduction to Cybersecurity (what it is and why it matters, career opportunities, real attack examples); Cyber Threats & Digital Safety (phishing, malware/ransomware, passwords, social engineering, staying safe online); System & Network Protection (network security basics, data protection, securing devices and accounts); Hands-on Practice (identifying threats, analyzing attack scenarios, protecting accounts/devices, basic tools and techniques).
## Price and payment
Offline 700.000; online 600.000. No instalments.
## Schedule and format
1 day, 5 hours (15:00-20:00). Offline at the Menara Sudirman campus; or online via Teams. Next group: August 30, 2026.
## Outcome and certificate
Live cybersecurity practice, understanding of threats and defense methods, a foundation for moving on to Cybersecurity Engineer + AI. IT STEP E-certificate. Demand evidence: ISC2 2025 shortage ~4.8M openings; Cybersecurity Ventures ~3.5M (https://cybersecurityventures.com/jobs/); ~113% of pre-pandemic hiring. Landing: https://itstep.id/id/cybersecurity-mini-course-protect-your-data-digital-system
